title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 09 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 09 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 09 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/08/2024
DCE iron ore futures saw a significant rebound in the morning, but fell back again in the afternoon, ending the day with a strong oscillation.The most-traded contract I2501 finally closed at 741.5 yuan/mt, up 0.27% for the day. Traders followed the market trend to sell; steel mills had fewer inquiries as the weekend approached. Overall market transactions were average today.
